name: timelinx
description: Browser-native timeline editor engine and UI

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @timelinx/core build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/react build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/media-web build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/ai build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/collab build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/ui build
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter @timelinx/demo build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/creator-editor build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/podcast-editor build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/pro-timeline build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/template-editor build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/headless-example build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/nl-command-demo build && pnpm --filter @timelinx/collab-demo build
scripts.dev:creator: pnpm --filter @timelinx/creator-editor dev
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @timelinx/core test && pnpm --filter @timelinx/react test && pnpm --filter @timelinx/media-web test && pnpm --filter @timelinx/ai test && pnpm --filter @timelinx/collab test
